nasb.text: “You shall not offer the blood of My sacrifice with leavened bread; nor is the fat of My feast to remain overnight until morning.

esv.text: “You shall not offer the blood of my sacrifice with anything leavened, or let the fat of my feast remain until the morning.

cnv.text: “你不可把我祭牲的血和有酵的餅一同獻上；也不可把我節日祭牲的脂油留過夜到早晨。

ccb.text: “不可把祭牲的血和有酵的饼一起献给我，也不可把祭牲的脂肪留到第二天早晨。
